channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Apple may be launching a new iPhone this week. It could sport a radical redesign
item.description: If you’re on the cusp of buying a new iPhone, you might want to hold off until this Wednesday, February 19. That’s the day Apple CEO Tim Cook says the company will be launching “the newest member of the family.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Fetterman blasts Musk over DOGE, IRS
item.description: Sen. John Fetterman (D-Pa.) went after tech billionaire Elon Musk over a report that his Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has been trying to access an IRS system. “I want to save billions of your money and make our government more efficient.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: DOGE sets up IRS, SEC accounts on X
item.description: The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has set up accounts on the social platform X for the IRS and the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), seeking “insights on finding and fixing waste, fraud and abuse” at the two agencies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Alexa’s big AI revamp might have been delayed again, and I’m losing faith Amazon's new assistant will be all that smart
item.description: Alexa’s big AI revamp may have just been delayed, again – and it sounds like Amazon’s assistant is getting dumber rather than smarter.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Hell freezes, pigs fly: Rumor has it that Intel could merge with AMD's former foundry in potential multi-billion deal
item.description: Rumors suggest that Intel could merge with GlobalFoundries, AMD's former chip manufacturer, in a potential multi-billion-dollar deal.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Amazon just killed a useful Kindle USB feature –leaving me stuck with less flexibility for ebook downloads and backups
item.description: In an effort to crack down on ebook piracy, Amazon is stopping users from downloading purchased titles to a computer.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Democrats plan Musk protests outside Tesla dealerships
item.description: Democratic activists are planning a protest campaign this week against tech billionaire and Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) head Elon Musk outside offices of lawmakers and Tesla dealerships.
item.dc:creator: Ailia Zehra, The Hill

item.title: WordPress Foundation bid for greater trademark control halted, adding to more legal setbacks for CEO Matt Mullenweg
item.description: WordPress foundation requested to disclaim rights to Hosted WordPress and Managed WordPress, but it's not a denial for the trademarks.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Government-linked Italian spyware maker caught distributing malicious Android apps
item.description: Security researchers accuse notorious spyware maker SIO of loading fake versions of popular apps and support tools with malicious code.
item.dc:creator: luke.hughes@futurenet.com (Luke Hughes), TechRadar

item.title: More details of Spotify's new Music Pro plan have leaked – including the price
item.description: It's been four years since Spotify promised us lossless audio, and the indications are that the wait is almost over.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Moss Landing battery fire: Residents sue Vistra, others for damages
item.description: A group of Monterey County residents filed a lawsuit in Alameda County against several companies for damages following the large fire at the Moss Landing Battery Plant on Jan. 16.
item.dc:creator: Kyarra Harris, The Mercury News

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple and Google app stores in the US
item.description: TikTok has returned to the app stores of Apple and Google in the U.S., after President Donald Trump delayed the enforcement of a TikTok ban.
item.dc:creator: Zen Soo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Juniper unveils EX4000 access switches to simplify enterprise network operations
item.description: Juniper has expanded its access layer options with a new switch family it says will help customers use automation and AI-based support to streamline enterprise operations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Screenshot-scanning malware discovered on Apple App Store in first-of-its-kind attack
item.description: Security experts have discovered that hackers are targeting apps on the App Store to spread malware that steals information from saved screenshots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Italian government denies it spied on journalists and migrant activists using Paragon spyware
item.description: ROME (AP) — The Italian government denied Wednesday that it had spied on journalists and migrant activists using spyware but said it would cooperate with an investigation into “vulnerabilities” after at least seven Italian cellphones were apparently hacked with military-grade surveillance technology
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD and PAOLO SANTALUCIA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Tech security 101: How to spot a hidden tracker on your car
item.description: 80% of stalking victims are tracked using tech. GPS trackers, like AirTags, are among the most popular ways to do it. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thomson Reuters scores early win in AI copyright battles in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Thomson Reuters has won an early battle in court over the question of fair use in artificial intelligence-related copyright cases.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI company Ross Intelligence loses copyright fight with Thomson Reuters
item.description: A US judge has ruled in favor of Thomson Reuters in a AI training fight against Ross Intelligence, a legal AI startup, according to The Verge. Thomson Reuters sued Ross Intelligence in 2020 for using the company’s legal research platform Westlaw to train Ross Intelligence’s AI without permission.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cisco doubles down on AI with new, updated certifications
item.description: Cisco this week furthered its commitment to help customers support and develop artificial intelligence systems by rolling out new certification and training courses aimed at teaching professionals everything from how to incorporate AI into specific roles to advanced networking design.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Why the Trump administration should uphold this final cyber executive order
item.description: Ilona Cohen, the chief legal and policy officer at HackerOne, explains why President Joe Biden’s new cyber executive order should be a priority. The post Why the Trump administration should uphold this final cyber executive order first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Cisco data center switches feature baked-in security for AI, networking duties
item.description: Cisco has unwrapped a new family of data center switches it says will help customers more securely support large workloads and facilitate AI development across the enterprise.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — The first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027, two years later than expected when a 12-year deal with Saudi Arabia was signed last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Don't fall for that sneaky iCloud storage alert in your inbox
item.description: Beware of iCloud scams using urgent messages. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you spot the red flags to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top translation apps for travelers
item.description: Travel abroad worry-free with these top translation apps for travelers. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson highlights some favorites.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cloud Computing Industry Sees Growth Slowdown Amid Concerns Over Costs and AI Investments
item.description: The major cloud providers, Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud, have reported sluggish growth in recent financial results, raising concerns over the costs of their services and investments in artificial intelligence (AI).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: VPN vs. ZTNA: Cisco tackles pros and cons
item.description: It’s no secret that more modern approaches to remote access have been usurping VPNs as organizations adapt to the realities of a distributed workforce, cloud-based applications, and heightened security threats.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: C++, Go, and Rust gaining popularity – Tiobe
item.description: With Tiobe’s February 2025 rankings, the publisher of the monthly index of programming language popularity notes that fast programming languages such as C++, Go, and Rust are gaining ground.
item.dc:creator: Info World
